data.title: SEACOR Marine Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Today, SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. (NYSE: SMHI), a prominent global provider of marine and support transportation services to offshore energy facilities, disclosed its first quarter outcomes for the period ending on March 31, 2026. The company, based in Houston, shared this information via GLOBE NEWSWIRE.

data.title: CORE LAB REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: With a revenue of $121.8 million, experiencing a 12% sequential decline and remaining flat year-over-year, the operating income stood at $1.9 million. Excluding items, the operating income was $6.6 million, down by 58% sequentially and 44% year-over-year. The GAAP loss per share was $0.02, while EPS excluding items amounted to $0.06, marking a 72% sequential decrease and a 58% year-over-year decrease.

data.title: Brera Holdings PLC (d/b/a Solmate Infrastructure) Appoints Ron Sade as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Brera Holdings PLC, trading on Nasdaq as SLMT, known as Solmate Infrastructure, has named Ron Sade as its new CEO, starting on May 1, 2026. Sade, who has been a board member since September 2025, with a background in technology investment and digital infrastructure, is anticipated to bring extensive insight to the company. His appointment is seen as a strategic move by the board, tapping into his leadership skills and industry knowledge.

data.title: Itafos Reports Continued Excellent Operational Results for Q1 2026
data.description: Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) (OTCQX: ITFS) based in Houston, released its Q1 2026 financial results, and shared a corporate update. The financial statements and management’s discussion for the period ending March 31, 2026, can be accessed on the Company’s profile at www.sedarplus.ca and its website www.itafos.com. All monetary values are in thousands of US Dollars. An archived webcast of management’s review of the Q1 2026 financial results and business update will be on the Company’s website on Monday, May 4, 2026.

data.title: Broadstone Net Lease Announces First Quarter 2026 Results and Adds $30 million to its Committed Pipeline of Build-to-Suit Developments
data.description: Victor, New York - Broadstone Net Lease has released its first quarter 2026 results, revealing a significant addition of $30 million to its committed pipeline for Build-to-Suit Developments.

data.title: Cenovus to hold first-quarter 2026 conference call and webcast and 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 6
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on April 29, 2026, Cenovus Energy Inc. (TSX:CVE) (NYSE:CVE) announced that they are set to unveil their first-quarter 2026 performance data on May 6, 2026. This disclosure will include comprehensive operational and financial figures from the first quarter. Interested parties can access the company's financial reports on their official website cenovus.com.

data.title: Greenland Energy Company Announces Closing of $70 Million Public Offering
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Houston-based Greenland Energy Company (NASDAQ: GLND) concluded its public offering of 16,250,000 common stock shares. The company, specializing in the energy sector in Greenland's Jameson Land Basin, successfully completed this transaction.

data.title: Allstate Reports Strong Earnings and Increased Growth
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois - On April 29, 2026, The Allstate Corporation shared their financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026. Tom Wilson, the company's representative, stated that their robust earnings and heightened growth in the quarter were attributed to Allstate's strategic approach and execution abilities. The Allstate Corporation is listed on the NYSE as ALL.

data.title: Hawthorn Bancshares Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Jefferson City, Missouri, on April 29, 2026, Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HWBK), the parent company of Hawthorn Bank, announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company disclosed a net income of $6.8 million during this period, translating to earnings per diluted share (EPS) of $0.98.

data.title: CEMATRIX Announces 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: CEMATRIX Corporation, a prominent supplier of cellular concrete in North America, recently disclosed its financial results for the first quarter completed on March 31, 2026. The company trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol "CEMX" and on the OTCQB under "CTXXF." Specializing in construction contracting, CEMATRIX remains a key player in the industry.

data.title: Chipotle Heats Up As Sales Top Estimates — Stock Jumps
data.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. saw its stock (NYSE: CMG) rise after the company released its first-quarter results after the market closed on Wednesday. In the report, Chipotle revealed earnings of 24 cents per share, meeting analyst forecasts. The company exceeded revenue expectations with quarterly earnings reaching $3.09 billion compared to the estimated $3.07 billion. In the first quarter, Chipotle opened 49 company-owned restaurants, including 42 locations featuring a Chipotlane. For a comprehensive analysis, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Denecimig (Mim8) significantly reduced annualized bleeding rate in people with hemophilia A, regardless of inhibitor status, in phase 3 data published in NEJM
data.description: Results from the pivotal FRONTIER2 study revealed that investigational denecimig demonstrated a significant reduction in annualized bleeding rate when compared to previous clotting factor prophylaxis and on-demand treatment in individuals with hemophilia A, regardless of inhibitor presence. The study examined the effectiveness and safety...

data.title: KLA Corp. Stock Slides On Q3 Earnings: What Investors Should Know
data.description: Tech company KLA Corp. (NASDAQ: KLAC) released its Q3 fiscal 2026 financial results after the market closed on Wednesday. The key metrics are as follows: Q3 Revenue came in at $3.42 billion, surpassing estimates of $3.37 billion, while Q3 Adjusted EPS was $9.40, exceeding estimates of $9.14. Despite the positive numbers, KLAC stock is experiencing a significant decline. Looking ahead, KLA Corp. anticipates Q4 revenue to fall within the range of $3.38 billion to $3.78 billion, lower than expectations of $3.54 billion, according to information from Benzinga Pro. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rambus Appoints Sumeet Gagneja as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Rambus Inc. (NASDAQ: RMBS) based in San Jose, California, has appointed Sumeet Gagneja as senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective from April 29, 2026. With over 20 years of experience in financial and operational roles within the semiconductor, data center, and AI-driven computing sectors, Mr. Gagneja will now lead Rambus' worldwide finance team. His responsibilities will include managing financial strategies, capital allocation, and investor relations.
